extra.reason: Fixed: Changed driver from sqlite3 to sqlite in config validation, added modernc.org/sqlite import
Fixed: Added GetReviewEventIDAndStatus and ClearReviewEventID methods. Publisher now checks status=published before skipping and clears provisional event ID on publish failure.
Fixed: TryAuthorizeFreeReview now properly returns commit errors instead of silently converting them to false
Fixed: Changed comparison from < to > so listener uses the more recent timestamp (hwm vs lookback) instead of always using the older one

Fixed payment token timing issue. Token is now marked as 'token_spent' immediately after melting, creating a recoverable state before authorization. If subscription creation or authorization fails, the token_spent status prevents fund loss and enables reconciliation. Updated schema, added MarkReviewPaymentTokenSpent method, updated IsTokenHashUsed to prevent double-spending during recovery window. All tests pass.
Fixed by creating extractor per Build() call instead of sharing one. Tree-sitter parsers are mutable and now thread-safe. All tests pass.

Fixed race condition by implementing atomic check-and-increment in Store interface. Added CheckAndIncrementRateLimit() method that uses SQL transactions (SQLStore) and mutex locking (MemoryStore) to prevent concurrent requests from exceeding rate limit. Added concurrency test to verify fix. All tests pass.

Fixed: canonical repo config is now read from a distinct canonical cache path for PR tips and patch series, preventing fork-populated caches from influencing review policy. Added regression coverage and verified go test ./... passes.
Wired payment authorization into runtime/pipeline, applied per-endpoint LLM API keys, made embedding dimension configurable, and registered subscribed event handlers.

Implemented ingest-boundary Nostr event integrity validation: ProcessEvent now rejects mismatched IDs, invalid signatures, and implausible timestamps before storage/dispatch, increments the rejected-events metric, and logs the rejection reason. Added focused ingest tests for ID mismatch rejection/no dispatch, valid signed dispatch, and future timestamp rejection. Added v6 settled-funds escrow ledger; assignment creation atomically reserves paid funds with repo/requester/amount binding; payouts consume reservations exactly once. Added over-allocation, concurrent double-claim, mismatch, migration, and payout idempotency tests; build and full test suite pass.

Bumped cascadia-go v0.6.0->v0.8.0 (drops go-nostr), removed nostrlib replace hack, pinned upstream fiatjaf.com/nostr@20260611. Reconciled NewPool()/AuthRequiredHandler API change. go-nostr fully absent from build graph. Build + full tests + -race all green. Surfaced upstream checkptr bug as DRYDOCK-2h1 with CI mitigation.
Implemented: PR tip diff vs merge-base with canonical default branch, carried through PrepareResult.Diff into the pipeline

Tiers 1-3 implemented: ModelForRoute resolves configured endpoint model; ModelIdentity registry observes served model from every chat-completion response (keyed by baseURL+credential hash+configured model); startup VerifyEndpoints probes /v1/models, warns on mismatch, seeds single-model endpoints. Per-request propagation split to DRYDOCK-4ln.

ChatCompletion now returns ChatResult{Content, Model}; the reviewer's per-response served model flows into RunOutput.ServedModel (single-run and ensemble paths) and the runner publishes it, falling back to registry/config resolution only when the provider omits the model field.

Runner fails closed when the deterministic changed-file set is empty; engine filters reviewer findings (single-run + ensemble) and walkthrough file summaries to the changed set, logging dropped paths. Root-cause diff fix already in e090e6d; both need deployment.

Status gate implemented: review.statuses repo config (default [open], draft opt-in, merged/closed unconfigurable), runner gates on GetRootStatus with status_skipped: permanent-skip semantics excluded from the requeue sweep. Explicit force-trigger split to a follow-up issue.

internal/profile service: on startup fetches current kind 0 from read relays, publishes when missing or when configured metadata differs (unmanaged fields like lud16 preserved); icon/banner pushed to a configured Blossom server (BUD-01/02) with content-addressed URLs; all metadata configurable via DRYDOCK_PROFILE_* / DRYDOCK_BLOSSOM_SERVERS env.
